prompt: I was charged twice for my subscription this month. I can see two charges of $149.99 on my credit card statement.
reference: I apologize for the inconvenience. I've looked up your account and can confirm you were accidentally charged twice. I have issued a refund of $149.99 for the duplicate charge. You should see it back on your statement in 3-5 business days. Refund ID: REF-12345.

prompt: Can you show me my last invoice? I need it for my tax records.
reference: Certainly. I've retrieved your last invoice (INV-98765) for $149.99 dated April 1st. You can download the PDF from your account dashboard or I can email it to you.
